study_name: Loneliness and WTP for Kid-Adulting Products
hypothesis: When people are temporarily induced into a state of loneliness (vs. a neutral control state), they will show higher willingness to pay (WTP) for kid-adulting products — products that blend childhood nostalgia or playful aesthetics with adult functionality.

loneliness.label: loneliness
loneliness.prompt_text: Please take a few minutes to recall a time in your life when you felt deeply lonely and isolated. Try to picture that time as clearly as possible, including where you were and what was happening. In the box below, please write about this experience, describing the situation and how you felt being so disconnected from others.

control.label: control
control.prompt_text: Please take a few minutes to think about your typical weekday morning routine, from the moment you wake up until you start your main activity for the day (e.g., work, school). Consider the sequence of events in a neutral, factual way. In the box below, please describe this routine in detail.

products.description: Relive your Saturday morning cartoon days with Cosmic Crunch Cereal Bites. We've transformed your favorite sugary, star-shaped cereal into a sophisticated snack bar with a creamy vanilla coating and a hint of sea salt. It's the perfect nostalgic pick-me-up for your coffee break, offering a grown-up taste with a playful crunch.

Stay warm in style with the Retro Arcade Hoodie. This premium, soft-fleece hoodie features a subtle, embroidered design of a classic 8-bit space invader on the chest and a vibrant, pixelated pattern inside the hood. It's a comfortable, high-quality garment that gives a nod to your gaming past without sacrificing modern style.

Bring a touch of prehistoric fun to your workspace or living room with the Dino-Plant Holder. This ceramic planter is shaped like a friendly Brontosaurus, with a hollowed-out back perfectly sized for a small succulent or air plant. It's a whimsical yet stylish way to add some green to your adult space.

Remember those glittery jelly sandals? We've captured that '90s magic in the Jelly-Pop Keychain Wallet. Made from durable, translucent PVC infused with sparkling glitter, this compact wallet holds your essential cards and cash. Clip it to your keys or bag for a fun, functional, and nostalgic accessory.

Quench your thirst with a playful twist. Gummy Bear Fizz is a lightly sparkling seltzer with zero sugar, infused with the natural fruit flavors of your favorite childhood gummy candies—pineapple, raspberry, and orange. It’s a guilt-free, refreshing beverage that tastes like a sweet escape.

manipulation_checks.item_text: Right now, I feel disconnected from others.

wtp.description: What is the maximum price you would be willing to pay for this product? (Please enter a numerical value in USD, e.g., 15.50)

nostalgia.item_text: This product reminds me of my childhood.

comfort.item_text: This product would make me feel comforted.

surrogate.item_text: This product would make me feel more connected.

attention_check.item_text: For quality control, please select the number 4 for this item.
